fields.label: Script type
fields.rationale: DocType Event hooks into document lifecycle events. API exposes a whitelisted endpoint. Scheduler Event runs on a cron cadence. Permission Query filters rows at the query layer. Workflow Task runs as part of a Workflow Action. Each type uses a different subset of fields.

fields.label: Target DocType (DocType Event / Permission Query)
fields.rationale: Required when script_type is DocType Event or Permission Query. The Frappe form gates the field via depends_on but there is NO server-side validation that it is present - if the specialist omits it for a DocType Event script, the hook silently never fires. Empty for API / Scheduler Event / Workflow Task.

fields.label: Event hook (DocType Event only)
fields.rationale: Load-bearing: picking the wrong event runs the script at the wrong moment. Before Save runs on every save attempt (use to throw / cancel the save). Before Submit runs only on the 0->1 docstatus transition (use to gate approvals). After Save fires AFTER the document is persisted (use for side-effects where you need the saved name). On Trash fires on delete; Before Print during print render. Payment events fire from Payment Gateway integrations.

fields.label: API endpoint path (API only)
fields.rationale: Required when script_type=API. The path to call via frappe.client.api_method(...). No server-side validation that it's set - missing value means the endpoint silently never registers. Empty for other script_types.

fields.label: Allow unauthenticated access (API only)
fields.rationale: When 1, the API endpoint accepts calls without a logged-in user. Default 0 is safe; enable only for genuinely public endpoints (contact form intake, webhook receivers).

fields.label: Scheduler frequency (Scheduler Event only)
fields.rationale: Required when script_type=Scheduler Event. Cron requires cron_format. The *_Long variants have longer timeouts for jobs that take more than a few minutes. Updating this field syncs the underlying Scheduled Job Type automatically.

fields.label: Cron expression (event_frequency=Cron)
fields.rationale: Required when event_frequency=Cron. Standard 5-field crontab expression (minute hour dom month dow). Empty for other frequencies.

fields.label: Script body (Python)
fields.rationale: RestrictedPython body. The deploy dry-run COMPILES via FrappeTransformer which REJECTS any `import` statement, bare `exec`, assignment to `__builtins__`, or attribute access that fails safer_getattr. Use the pre-bound `frappe`, `_`, `db`, `qb`, `frappe.utils.*`, `json`, `datetime` directly - no imports. Read doc state with `doc.fieldname` or `frappe.db.get_value`, write with `doc.db_set`. Never string-interpolate into `frappe.db.sql` (SQL injection).

fields.label: Rate-limit the endpoint (API only)
fields.rationale: When 1 (API script_type only), applies rate_limit_count requests per rate_limit_seconds window per caller. Default off.

fields.label: Disabled
fields.rationale: Default enabled. Disabled Scheduler Event scripts stop the underlying Scheduled Job Type; disabled DocType Event scripts skip the hook silently. Use for staging or emergency kill-switch.
